message.content:
Explore and document the actual file structure in two directories to verify the Ralph migration file mappings:

1. SOURCE: `~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/`
2. TARGET: `~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/`

For each directory:
- List all files (recursively)
- Identify the subdirectory structure (api/, models/, hooks/, repository/, services/, store/)
- Note any naming differences between source and target

Compare against the FILE_MAP in `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/scripts/validate-migration.sh` to identify any discrepancies.

Return a structured report of:
1. Files in source not mapped
2. Files in target not mapped
3. Incorrect mappings in FILE_MAP
4. Suggested corrections
